mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, create_date, modified_date FROM about_post ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, create_date, modified_date FROM about_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, create_date, modified_date FROM about_post WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, create_date, modified_date FROM about_post WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO about_post (title, content, user_id, user_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, visibility_level, create_date, modified_date) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{counselType}, 0, #{visibilityLevel}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE about_post SET comment_count = #{commentCount}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE about_post SET visibility_level = #{visibilityLevel}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
